In Essex, a mother and her daughter find what seems to be the perfect house, only for their lives to be made a misery after they object to a planning application for an extension. Two elderly residents who feel they are the victims of noise from next door have to deny any wrongdoing themselves when the police arrive on their doorstep

programme.title: Get Your Tatts Out: Kavos Ink
programme.desc: Three strip-club workers have a contest to drum up more business, with the loser having a mammary-based reminder of his failure sketched onto his leg. Holiday-maker Nelson has his pals' names inked on his backside, while another comes up with a design representing his favourite body part

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Divine Designs
programme.desc: Paul Binski visits Liverpool's two cathedrals, which lie at either end of Hope Street. Despite having been built within 60 years of each other they represent starkly contrasting styles, the Anglican edifice being a vast tribute to neo-Gothic design and its Catholic counterpart a typical example of 1960s modernism

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Compilation of highlights from the home improvement series, featuring bedroom and bathroom makeovers by Californian designer Ann Maurice

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Holly is left in charge of Little Kingdom while the king and queen are away

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy and Danny Dog are excited as Captain Daddy Dog returns from the sea

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The children take a trip to a dinosaur park to celebrate Freddy Fox's birthday

programme.title: Mya Go
programme.desc: Mya digs a well at Grandma and Grandpa Go's house, and helps them to look after the garden

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You
programme.desc: Josh follows a series of clues to work out which book Blue wants to read

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: When Ruth's new car, Cleo, takes to the rails to race Thomas, she soon discovers why she is designed to stick to the roads

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Station Officer Steele joins Trevor and the gang for a picnic at Crabscuttle cove, but when their satnav goes wrong and leads them into wet sand, Elvis must try to save the day

programme.title: Daisy & Ollie
programme.desc: The duo would love to travel into outer-space and visit all the other planets in the solar system, so Whizzy helps the children imagine what each planet would be like

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: The Mighty Pups have to save the day when Harold makes a cloning machine and Mayor Humdinger clones five versions of himself.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Suzy and Peppa start a secret club, but soon everyone wants to join

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig goes to Grampy Rabbit's boatyard to get his boat fixed

programme.title: Milkshake! Bop Box Boogie
programme.desc: Specially composed and choreographed songs themed around pets, with the presenters teaching the audience the moves and then encouraging them to dance along with them

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Mr Gruber gives Paddington a box of magic tricks, but the bear cannot master them until he learns to practise hard

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway's purse has disappeared, along with its precious cargo, Chickaletta

programme.title: Ricky Zoom
programme.desc: There are only four gold tickets to Steel Awesome's premiere, and the race is on to find them

programme.title: Pirata & Capitano
programme.desc: A curse creates a duplicate of the ship and its crew, and soon Pirata's reputation is ruined by her copy's fondness for practical jokes

programme.title: Milkshake! Monkey's Amazing Adventures
programme.desc: Milkshake! Monkey discovers different types of bridges in Scotland and what they are used for

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: Turbo tries to play a game of baseball against a mechanical pitcher

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Delroy and Kevin face a web of deceit in an Italian delicatessen in south London as they chase a huge debt amounting to £29,000. Meanwhile, Steve and Paul must evict a tenant in north London who has not paid her rent for over 18 months, before heading to Cambridgeshire to make one of their most emotional evictions to date. Plus, Brian and Delroy track down a pensioner in Surrey who owes £15,000 for a business he bought four years ago

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Teorin and Collette had high hopes when they let out their five-bedroom family home, but it wasn't long before their tenant stopped paying rent - and then turned the house into a hostel for holiday-makers. Quickly running out of options, the couple turn to eviction specialist Chris Sharpe for help. Plus, Harrow council officers discover 40 people crammed into a potential deathtrap of a house, and a woman who relies on her rent for medical expenses tries to claw back some from her tenant

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: With Colby's trial fast approaching, tensions are high. A hidden witness will be called to the stand, only known as X. Owen makes a tough decision

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: From the hospital bed, Sheila asks Des for one last, huge favour. Upset by all the hurt they have caused, Clive wonders whether he and Jane are moving too fast

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Featuring two quarrelling neighbours who record each other's every moment on CCTV and in diaries. Their dispute began when Thomas parked his caravan on a quiet cul-de-sac, much to the annoyance of his neighbour Mrs Potter. Plus, how a shared driveway pushed Susie to breaking point when her neighbour Grant put her young daughter at risk. Susie decided to install gates across the drive and use it for family barbecues, but Grant took matters into his own hands and it ended in a trip to the police station for him

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Sea Change (2007)
programme.desc: New England police chief Jesse Stone reopens the unsolved case of a bank teller who was was shot dead in broad daylight. Although the crime was committed more than 12 years earlier, Stone believes evidence that was overlooked the first time round could prove crucial to solving the mystery. Detective thriller, starring Tom Selleck, Kathy Baker and Kohl Sudduth

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: From the hospital bed, Sheila asks Des for one last, huge favour. Upset by all the hurt they have caused, Clive wonders whether he and Jane are moving too fast

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: With Colby's trial fast approaching, tensions are high. A hidden witness will be called to the stand, only known as X. Owen makes a tough decision

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ships
programme.desc: The Seven Seas Explorer heads to St Petersburg in Russia, the most popular destination of the Baltic cruise. While guests are away on land, the cleaning team works in full force, facing one of the most important jobs - cleaning the giant 6,000 crystal chandelier in the atrium. Meanwhile, a new butler starts on board and it remains to be seen how long it will take for him to find his sea legs. Towards the end of the trip, cruise director John takes a huge gamble after being called into action to find replacement entertainment

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: The comedian takes a tour of the Cotswolds, beginning in Tetbury, where she gets some tips for a practice run for the market town's famous woolsack races, before moving on to Westonbirt, home to forest bathing and a club devoted to puddings. Susan moves on to Bourton-on-the-Water miniature village, makes a spoon under the guidance of a special silversmith, and explores the gardens of an Indian palace in the midst of the Cotswolds

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: A journey through the mountains of the Italian Riviera in a restored vintage 1920s train, beginning at Cinque Terre national park, and concluding in the historic port city of Genoa. Along the way, the train stops at the elegant resort of Santa Margherita and the remote 10th-century abbey of San Fruttuoso

programme.title: Greatest Hits of the
programme.desc: The stories behind six songs from the decade, examining Hot Chocolate's You Sexy Thing, Bee Gees' Stayin' Alive, Wuthering Heights by Kate Bush, Chic's Le Freak, Knowing Me, Knowing You by Abba, and Queen's Somebody to Love. Featuring music videos and archive footage, as well as input from artists, songwriters, musicians and producers who worked on the recordings

programme.title: Abba: When All Is Said and Done
programme.desc: Docudrama telling the stories of singers Agnetha Faltskog and Anni-Frid Lyngstad, told through the words both of those in Abba's close circle and of the women themselves. Agnetha Faltskog was the band's blonde sweetheart, but privately she was very different and found fame difficult to cope with and ended up in court battling a stalker that she had let into her life, while Anni-Frid enjoyed the limelight, but her rags-to-riches story is one of immense loss and tragedy

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A Devon woman finds herself spending a night in the cells after a dispute with a neighbour who just happens to be a policeman, while a York man gets an unexpected soaking after an argument with the person next door. In Glasgow, an upset over an invitation leads to a hospital visit and a criminal record for one unhappy homeowner

programme.title: 10 Ways to Lose 10 Years
programme.desc: Cherry Healey demonstrates how hair and make-up tricks can give people a youthful boost. She teams up with hair and beauty experts to deliver 10 ways to roll back the years by tackling a range of age-related issues. Together, they give viewers the tips and tricks they need to impress

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Divine Designs
programme.desc: Dr Paul Binski, head of art history at Cambridge University, examines icons and artefacts integral to the design of St Sophia's Greek Orthodox Cathedral in London's Regent's Park

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The Great Sioux Massacre (1965)
programme.desc: A corrupt senator coaxes Colonel Custer out of retirement with the prospect of presidential office, and the soldier tries to further his political ambitions by wresting control of the current military campaign from its commanding officer, culminating in his last stand at the Battle of the Little Bighorn. Western, with Philip Carey, Joseph Cotten, Darren McGavin and Julie Sommars

programme.title: Cottage to Let (1941)
programme.desc: A British inventor's revolutionary bombsight is set to have a positive impact on the war effort. However, military intelligence detects the Nazis are aware of the invention, while a plucky teenage cockney evacuated to the boffin's Scottish country estate sets out to expose a German spy ring. Second World War thriller, with Leslie Banks, John Mills, Alastair Sim and George Cole in his screen debut

programme.title: The Lady Vanishes (1979)
programme.desc: An American heiress befriends an elderly lady on a continental train journey, but wakes one morning to find she has disappeared and the other passengers deny having ever seen the missing woman - leading to suspicions that a conspiracy is afoot. Remake of Hitchcock's 1938 mystery, starring Elliott Gould, Cybill Shepherd, Angela Lansbury, Herbert Lom, Arthur Lowe and Ian Carmichael

programme.title: Dakota Incident (1956)
programme.desc: Mismatched travellers, including a bank robber, a politician and a dancing girl, are targeted by Cheyenne braves when their stagecoach is ambushed in the Dakota desert. When the coach is set on fire, they take cover in a gully, and a drawn-out conflict ensues. Western, starring Dale Robertson, Linda Darnell, John Lund and Ward Bond

programme.title: 27 Dresses (2008)
programme.desc: Singleton Jane is literally always the bridesmaid and never the bride, a role she assumes for the 28th time when her sister announces she is getting married - to a man Jane is secretly in love with. As she wrestles with her feelings, Jane's predicament attracts the attention of a reporter fascinated by her story. Romantic comedy, starring Katherine Heigl, James Marsden and Malin Akerman

programme.title: The Guilty (2018)
programme.desc: Asger, a frustrated and troubled cop, is mired in a mysterious workplace controversy and has been confined to the emergency response help lines while the issue is resolved. He gets a confusing call from a woman named Iben, who appears to be in immediate danger after being abducted by her partner. Asger tries to piece together where she is and how to get help to her. Writer/director Gustav Moller's crime drama, starring Jakob Cedergren. In Danish with English subtitles

programme.title: Heat (1995)
programme.desc: An armoured car hold-up sets a veteran police detective on the trail of a highly intelligent career criminal, whom he is obsessed with capturing. Meanwhile, the robber is planning an elaborate bank heist as his final job before retiring, and a complex game of cat and mouse develops between the two. Michael Mann's crime thriller, starring Al Pacino, Robert De Niro, Val Kilmer, Jon Voight, Tom Sizemore and Natalie Portman

programme.title: Skin Trade (2014)
programme.desc: After his family is killed by a Serbian gangster with international interests, a New York detective goes to south-east Asia to team up with a Thai detective to destroy the syndicate's human trafficking network. Thriller, starring Dolph Lundgren, Tony Jaa, Michael Jai White and Ron Perlman

programme.title: Bitter Victory (1957)
programme.desc: Two British officers are assigned to lead a raid on a German stronghold in Libya and steal secret documents. However, one of the pair suspects the other of having had an affair with his wife and the tension between them threatens the mission. Second World War drama, starring Richard Burton, Curt Jurgens, Ruth Roman and Christopher Lee

programme.title: Border River (1954)
programme.desc: A Confederate officer takes part in a daring mission to buy weapons to aid in the hard-fought battles against the Yankees, but things go awry, forcing his one true love to save him. Western, starring Joel McCrea, Yvonne de Carlo, Pedro Armendariz and Howard Petrie

programme.title: A Man Alone (1955)
programme.desc: A gunman stumbles across the bodies of passengers murdered in a stagecoach robbery. Riding to the nearest town to report the crime, he finds himself accused of the killings and faces a battle to prove his innocence. Western, directed by and starring Ray Milland, with Raymond Burr, Lee Van Cleef, Mary Murphy and Ward Bond

programme.title: The Thirty-Nine Steps (1978)
programme.desc: An innocent man is informed of a devious plan to start the First World War by murdering a foreign minister. Almost immediately, he is framed for murder and embarks on a perilous cross-country trek to prove his innocence, pursued by both the police and ruthless spies. Thriller - the third film adaptation of John Buchan's novel - starring Robert Powell, Karen Dotrice, John Mills and George Baker

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2 (2015)
programme.desc: A Cappella group the Barden Bellas enjoy an unprecedented run of success, until a disastrous performance sees them banned from national competitions and beset by scandal. They attempt to turn their fortunes around and redeem their reputation by competing in the World Championships of A Cappella in Copenhagen. Comedy sequel, starring Anna Kendrick and Rebel Wilson

programme.title: Searching (2018)
programme.desc: When his 16-year-old daughter Margot disappears from her California home, and a police investigation yields few results, David Kim decides to explore her laptop. He contacts her friends in the hope of gleaning some information regarding her location, and discovers a secret about her piano lessons that could be a vital key to the puzzle. Thriller, starring John Cho and Debra Messing

programme.title: Gone Girl (2014)
programme.desc: A woman disappears without trace on her fifth wedding anniversary. Her husband contacts the police, but struggles to cope as his marriage is scrutinised by the media. As his behaviour grows stranger and more evasive, he finds himself accused of her murder. David Fincher's crime thriller based on Gillian Flynn's novel, starring Ben Affleck, Rosamund Pike and Neil Patrick Harris

programme.title: The Woman in the Fifth (2011)
programme.desc: An American writer flies to Paris hoping to reconcile with his estranged wife, but is rejected and forced to work at a hotel to support himself. He has an affair with a mysterious guest who reignites his literary passion, but who also leads him through a series of strange and disturbing experiences. Thriller based on Douglas Kennedy's novel, with Ethan Hawke and Kristin Scott Thomas

programme.title: Anne of the Thousand Days (1969)
programme.desc: Henry VIII wins the hand of his ill-fated second wife Anne Boleyn by divorcing his first queen Katherine of Aragon, leading to a cataclysmic rift between the English Crown and the Vatican. However, when the marriage fails to produce a male heir, Henry and his council bring allegations of adultery, incest and treason against Anne, and condemn her to death. Historical drama, starring Richard Burton, Genevieve Bujold, Anthony Quayle, Michael Hordern and Irene Papas

programme.title: A Night to Remember (1958)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama recreating the sinking of the Titanic, told from the point of view of the ship's second officer as he struggles to get as many passengers and crew off the vessel before it sinks. Meanwhile, the captain of a nearby vessel embarks on a doomed rescue mission. Starring Kenneth More, Honor Blackman, Ronald Allen, Tucker McGuire and David McCallum

programme.title: Ten Tall Men (1951)
programme.desc: A Foreign Legion sergeant learns a tribal leader is planning to launch an attack on a remote fort, and leads a small band of soldiers into the desert to distract the enemy hordes. However, he soon discovers a more dangerous threat - the Legion's various foes are plotting to join forces. Comedy adventure, starring Burt Lancaster, Jody Lawrence and Kieron Moore

programme.title: The Monuments Men (2014)
programme.desc: Seven experts in fine art are assembled into a military platoon during the Second World War, and given an unusual mission. They are sent into occupied Europe to recover priceless works of art that have fallen into Nazi hands and ensure the masterpieces survive the conflict. Fact-based drama, directed by and starring George Clooney. With Matt Damon, Bill Murray and Cate Blanchett

programme.title: Raw Deal (1986)
programme.desc: An FBI agent is discharged for insubordination after assaulting a suspect, and ends up reduced to being the sheriff of a backwater Southern town. He is later offered his old job back - on the condition he will infiltrate a gang of Chicago mobsters and bring their leader to justice for killing the son of the Bureau's chief. Action thriller, with Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sam Wanamaker, Kathryn Harrold, Ed Lauter and Darren McGavin

programme.title: Sin City: A Dame to Kill For (2014)
programme.desc: Compilation of four stories of crime and betrayal set in a dangerous city. An honourable thug dishes out some vigilante justice, a private eye falls for the machinations of a femme fatale, a gambler gets in over his head, and a stripper plots revenge. Crime thriller sequel based on the comic-book series, starring Eva Green, Mickey Rourke, Jessica Alba and Josh Brolin

programme.title: The Wolverine (2013)
programme.desc: The former member of the X-Men is lured out of hiding and travels to Japan, where a dying businessman offers him the chance to give up his immortality for a normal life. He ends up robbed of his superhuman powers by a mysterious scientist and is forced to protect the tycoon's granddaughter from a secret conspiracy's assassins. Superhero adventure spin-off, starring Hugh Jackman and Tao Okamoto

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesake's magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Harry Hill introduces two international challenges on the second day of finals week - a Japanese inspired technical and tartlets combining flavours from around the world

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Malcolm and his brothers take advantage of Lois's illness by convincing her it is Sunday so they can skip school, while Hal goes in search of a sports car. Frankie Muniz stars

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Malcolm and Reese fight it out at a water park, Spangler challenges Francis to an unusual variation of pool, and Dewey spends the day with a peculiar babysitter. Comedy, starring Frankie Muniz and Justin Berfield

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Leonard and Sheldon are invited to speak at UC Berkeley, they decide to take a detour and try to meet one of their idols - Star Wars director George Lucas. Meanwhile, Raj and Amy offer to settle a dispute with a game of table tennis. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard finds out that he has a half-brother, Sheldon and Amy have a platonic sleepover, and Penny gets an offer to audition for a Kevin Smith film. American comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: In a New Girl crossover episode, Peralta runs into Jess Day, who is visiting New York from Los Angeles, and enlists her help on his latest case. Holt looks for ways to improve the team's morale as they come to terms with being on the night shift, while Santiago is filled with curiosity when Diaz starts to take long breaks from her desk. Zooey Deschanel (New Girl) and Matt Walsh (Veep) guest star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: On Halloween, the squad members follow precinct tradition and pull out all the stops as they compete for the title of Ultimate Detective Slash Genius in the Halloween Heist. Peralta, Santiago and Holt are the determined competitors - but who will be crowned the reigning champion?

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: After being released from the mental hospital, Dr Sturgis unexpectedly breaks up with Meemaw. US comedy, starring Iain Armitage, Wallace Shawn and Annie Potts

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: A church carnival leads Missy to try out for the baseball team. Meemaw struggles after her break-up with Dr Sturgis. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage, Raegan Revord and Annie Potts

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon falls ill, and his friends decide to go to a Planet of the Apes movie marathon to keep their distance, knowing he will be in a terrible mood. However, an unsuspecting Penny offers to nurse him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels threatened by a 15-year-old physics prodigy who is even cleverer than he is, and asks Leonard to help him discredit the precocious teenager's research. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Trouble arises when Amy learns that Sheldon has applied for a one-way mission to colonise Mars. Meanwhile, Leonard surprises Penny with a gift, and Raj decides to snoop around Emily's flat after she is called back to work during their evening together. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: A burglary on the set of a TV detective show distracts Peralta and Diaz from the precinct's on-going evaluation. As the rest of the squad concentrate on the task in hand and a new auditor takes over, Peralta finds himself charmed by the glamour of showbusiness

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz tries to soothe Jeffords' ego after a professional setback. Meanwhile, Santiago spends some precious time with Captain Holt. Crime comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Meemaw meets Dale's ex-wife June, while Sheldon is forced to work on a group project with reluctant college students. Iain Armitage stars

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Sheldon visits the California Institute of Technology for the very first time. Georgie is furious when Mary listens in on a phone call with his girlfriend, while Meemaw tries to cheer up a jealous Missy

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: An unusual commitment ceremony rocks the experiment. Rumours and gossip spill out and the spouses demand answers. Secrets are revealed, lies exposed, and accusations fly

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Elated at being named one of People magazine's '30 to Watch Under 30', Raj makes a pass at Penny and becomes very arrogant, making it hard for Leonard to maintain a positive perspective on his friend's new-found confidence. Guest starring Charlie Sheen

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to confront his fear of driving when both Penny and Howard refuse to give him a lift to work. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon disagree over whether to continue holding their regular Roommate Agreement meetings, with Leonard suggesting they are no longer required, while Sheldon believes they are still essential. As the pair's squabble quickly escalates into a full-blown argument, the rest of their friends turn up for a planned Game of Thrones viewing party, and end up taking sides in the dispute - resulting in two warring factions taking up residence in 4A and 4B. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang goes to a bar and runs into Penny's old boyfriend Zack, while Bernadette is left to spend the evening with Sheldon when she cannot go wine tasting with the others. Elsewhere, things do not go to plan when Raj introduces his new girlfriend, Claire. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating: The Mansion
programme.desc: The celebrity boys face their very first Breakfast Dilemma, where they each must choose one single girl to date. Later, Chloe has a difficult decision to make

programme.title: Taskmaster

Alex Horne acts as Davies' right-hand-man, coaxing the contestants to reveal how comic, creative and seriously competitive they are

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Spike tussles with Angel on his unwelcome return, leading to a duel of witty rebuttals and snide comments as the duo set out on a quest to track an unhappy occultist. Supernatural drama, starring David Boreanaz and James Marsters

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: A wealthy family lose their fortune after being defrauded by their business manager, and move to the small town they bought for their son as a joke birthday gift in 1991

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard questions his engineering abilities when he and Sheldon can't get a toy drone to fly. A cancelled flight almost stops Leonard from giving the commencement address at his former high school, while Raj pits his parents against each other when his father cuts him off financially

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Body-confident Ben's plans for a hot-tub wedding may prove to be too much for bride-to-be Hayley, who has always dreamed of a traditional Jewish wedding

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining six young bakers create baking illusions that deceive the eye, before making a mysterious cake with a central line that reveals the flavours on the inside

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Malcolm finally meets his match in the form of an intriguing girl, and Reese attempts to break into an ice-cream truck. Meanwhile, Francis makes a bold bet at military camp and Dewey wanders off into the countryside. Frankie Muniz stars

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Malcolm and his brothers set about creating the ultimate stealth weapon with a little help from Francis, who is on leave from the military academy. Lois and Hal tackle a dangerous driver who has been terrorising the neighbourhood by building their own speed bump

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is asked to create a message on the off-chance a Nasa mission discovers alien life, and the guys fight over what he should do. Meanwhile, Penny contemplates returning to acting. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp introduces new crafts, skills and techniques for interior decoration. In this edition, she reveals how to create a personalised vintage doormat and coasters, using spray paint, old tiles and serviettes

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Jasmine Harmin and Laura Hamilton go head to head to help Sue and David Sherlock from Stockport. The couple want a fresh start with their daughter, but cannot decide where to start their new adventure. David is championing the Lake District, close to his three grown-up daughters, but Sue wants a complete change and thinks their future lies in the Dordogne region of France. Jasmine is given a UK budget of £730,000, but it's going to be close as Laura tries to entice them across the Channel with three attractive properties in France worth up to £500,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole head to Surrey and Hampshire. Simon builds a huge kitchen table from discarded rafters and gives a 1970s campervan a new lease of life. Henry hankers after an American tractor and Royal Enfield motorbike and sidecar

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The programme heads to Lowestoft in Suffolk, where Henry Cole picks a valuable Lyons Tea enamel sign while Simon O'Brien converts a station trolley into a garden sofa

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: DIY fanatic Fiona contends with sub-zero temperatures as she sets out to renovate a chateau bedroom for her daughter, who is due to visit in two months, while new owners Erin and JB aim to transform the first floor of their property's south wing

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Chris and Sonya Bennett, who are planning to build a modern, environmentally friendly family home in Hampshire. The couple knock down a bungalow to put up a two-storey building, with Chris at the helm of the project - but they run into difficulties after a smooth start

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the White Lodge Hotel in Filey, North Yorkshire, where hosts James and Kim Hodgson hope their love of high standards will win over their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Amanda Lucia-Charley and her friend Alan Talbot invite the other hoteliers to sample the delights of Crystals on the Prom in Blackpool, where Alan introduces his alter-ego Ada

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the Old Red Lion Country Inn in Upper Poppleton, North Yorkshire, where pair Mark and Jean Lee hope their plain and simple pub B&B will impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest ends at glamping site Camp Katur in Kirklington, North Yorkshire, where Kerry Roy and Nicola Wilding hope to wow their guests with their unique 'geodomes' and see-through pods

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the contest arrives, and while Amanda Lucia-Charley and Alan Talbot receive harsh criticism of their breakfast, Mark and Jean Lee's decor receives scathing reviews

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect rediscovers some of the best tiny builds to be found up in the treetops across the world. In Tuscany, George visits a romantic treehouse, while in Sweden there's a tree hotel shaped like a UFO. The programme also features a tree house designed like a mirrored cube as well as a look back at the epic treehouse George and master carpenter Will Hardie built together in Kielder Forest Park

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: An elephant calf is born at Chester Zoo, but its young half-sister doesn't welcome the new arrival. Meanwhile, bush dog dad Franco is under pressure as its family grows, and an onager - a rare type of wild horse - faces a major operation

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: in and JB turn their attention to transforming their chateau's ruined orangery into a top-class events venue. When the concrete is delivered for a new floor, JB must race against time to find a missing piece of kit before the concrete sets. Tensions bubble to the surface as a new spa is delivered to Tim and Sasha's chateau, while Fiona celebrates her birthday and continues to battle sub-zero temperatures as she renovates a bedroom for her daughter Rochelle

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Leigh Osborne and Graham Voce want to convert and extend a landmark 150-year-old water tower in Kennington, south London, into a luxury home. Grade II-listed, derelict and with 6ft-thick walls, it's a huge challenge for the pair, who also plan to build two structures at the base - a lift shaft connected by a series of glass tunnels, and a modern living space. The result will be a four-bedroom property over nine floors, complete with a room at the top offering spectacular 360-degree views across the capital. Presented by Kevin McCloud

programme.title: Auschwitz Untold: In Colour
programme.desc: A powerful and revelatory account of one of the most hideous crimes in human history told from the perspectives of 16 extraordinary Holocaust survivors. The survivors retell of the rise of fascism, the uprooting of families, and the long journey from centuries-old Jewish communities into Auschwitz. The film includes a rare and haunting collection of photographs called the 'Auschwitz Album', and chronicles with unflinching detail the survival challenges at Auschwitz-Birkenau, as well as tales of resistance inside the camp, including sabotaging armaments for the Nazi war machine

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Consultant Emer Sutherland helps treat an eight-year-old who has fallen 8ft onto concrete while riding his BMX, losing his front teeth and possibly injuring his head and spine. A 19-year-old motorcyclist who hit a bollard requires urgent treatment on his leg, which may otherwise need to be amputated, and X-rays of a stabbing victim yield startling results

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock and Katherine Ryan take on Jon Richardson and Joe Wilkinson in the words-and-numbers quiz, while Adam Riches as Sean Bean joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: With their children having left home, Maureen and Brian Kellengher want to downsize and enjoy their retirement. However, while they love the idea of staying close to family and friends along the Suffolk-Essex border, they're excited about starting a whole new life in Lanzarote. Jonnie Irwin shows them three beautiful properties for their budget of £320,000 to tempt them to stay in the UK and Jasmine Harman goes all out with three properties for £225,000 in Lanzarote

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team rummage through the hangar of a Vulcan bomber, where Henry finds a cockpit seat to restore, and Simon attempts to turn part of a jet engine into a coffee table

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

Tensions bubble to the surface as a new spa is delivered to Tim and Sasha's chateau, while Fiona celebrates her birthday and continues to battle sub-zero temperatures as she renovates a bedroom for her daughter Rochelle

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton visits Devon to meet glass-blower Siddy Langley, who plans to build a combined home and studio, as soaring costs mean she can no longer afford to run her furnaces. The presenter is on hand to offer practical advice and encouragement, but there is little he can do when things begin to go seriously wrong

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Cholmeley Arms in Burton-le-Coggles, Lincolnshire, where chef John Berry and his wife Lesley hold a sausage-making competition for their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Islington Mill B&B in Salford, where Joe Spencer and Louise Woodcock have an alternative hosting style as their drag alter egos

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Third host Peter Morris welcomes guests to the Pebbles B&B in Seaton, Devon, but despite his breakfast award, not all of the guests are impressed by his culinary offerings

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Tarr Farm Inn on Exmoor, where Hilary Lester and Stacey Wade are proud of their five-star standards. However, Peter is on the warpath after his feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It is the last day of the competition and there is tension in the air, as Cholmeley Arms hosts John and Lesley want to get to the bottom of Peter's comments

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke and master craftsman Will Hardie find out how Norway, a country with some of the harshest weather on the planet, has become a leader in architectural design. Buildings include a treehouse that can withstand nine tons of snowfall and gale force winds, and an ice hotel complete with 30 rooms, a bar and even a snow chapel. Plus, a moveable home that has kept members of its community safe for hundreds of years

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Elderly one-eyed South African porcupine Roxy is introduced to a new, younger male called Henning, in the hope that she will find companionship in her old age. Kifaru, the oldest eastern black rhino at Chester Zoo, meets younger female Malindi, with the expectation that they will produce offspring to increase the dwindling population, while the Caribbean flamingos are breeding again

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Erin and JB test run the orangery as a new events space by hosting their A Midsummer Night's Dream-themed party for a group of friends visiting from the UK. In the south of France, Tim and Sasha set out to turn their chateau's original bathing pool - which has sat empty for 15 years - into a unique feature for a new wellness garden. Plus, Fiona unveils a plaque and hosts a party to celebrate her chateau's 845th birthday. To ensure the drinks are served at the right temperature, she transforms one of the chateau's old dungeons into the perfect wine cellar

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Audrey and Jeff Lovelock, who dream of living in one of west London's most exclusive areas. However, the only way they can afford it is to go underground. Their plan is to transform a listed Edwardian artist's studio - along with 5,000 square feet of derelict basement - into a bespoke subterranean home, complete with supersize kitchen, mezzanine sitting room, four en-suite bedrooms, a gym, cinema, steam room and wine cellar. As if the task was not tricky enough, they are doing it without proper architects' drawings and Audrey is project managing - and the difficulties begin almost from the start

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at house-hunters whose budgets proved a challenge for what they wanted to buy and where, including a couple who struggled to find a house with a large kitchen, garden and garage, and a man who wanted to replicate his childhood for his daughter in his home town of Poole

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The air ambulance is dispatched to collect Frances, an 80-year-old woman who fell three metres into her empty swimming pool while gardening, and has sustained a head wound that could have resulted in a life-altering bleed on the brain. Ruth, aged 86, arrives at St George's A&E with her heart beating three times faster than the normal rate. Doctors are concerned it may not be pumping enough blood around her body, and quickly prescribe fast-acting medication. Plus, students Jerry and Sakille turn up at the hospital after Jerry crashed her car on the way home from a party. While Jerry stayed sober to serve as the designated driver, she concludes that balancing a full-time job with her studies and a hectic social life might not be a sensible idea

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock and Harriet Kemsley take on special guest team captain Alan Carr and Catherine Tate in the words-and-numbers quiz, while Adam Buxton joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal allows himself to be led astray by rebellious new arrival Father Damien, and Ted is suspected of being the criminal mastermind behind a scandalous theft. Comedy, with Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Joe Rooney

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal and Ted get involved in yet another bout of rivalry with their counterparts over on Rugged Island - this time by writing a song that will allow them the dubious honour of representing Ireland in the Eurovision-style music contest Eurosong. Ardal O'Hanlon and Dermot Morgan star

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Iggy and Kapoor discover a patient might be suffering from lead poisoning, and are forced to take on the city. Max's unsolicited attempts to help a patient backfire

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to two restaurants - Giuseppi's and Sante La Brea - to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress? Plus, an update on Finn McCool's from season one

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal allows himself to be led astray by rebellious new arrival Father Damien, and Ted is suspected of being the criminal mastermind behind a scandalous theft. Comedy, with Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Joe Rooney

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie teams up with cider-maker Andy Thomstone to make a winter version of a popular drink, and demonstrates how to create the Italian favourite limoncello using leftover lemons

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Tim and Lili Maher have sold their house in north London, and with retirement on the horizon, they want to embrace a completely new way of life. They plan to spend most of the year on the northern Costa Blanca but also want to return to the UK to enjoy the English summers. So, the pressure's on to find two new homes. Ben Hillman shows Tim and Lili three properties in Great Yarmouth for their UK budget of £120,000, while Jasmine Harman goes all out on Spanish charm in northern Costa Blanca with their away budget of £240,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit a military vehicle enthusiast, where Henry mirror polishes a decommissioned missile and Simon repurposes a tank turret

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are on the Wirral, where Simon has a plan to turn a chunky chain into a standard lamp and Henry picks up a 1963 Ford Anglia to get it back to its best

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Erin and JB test run the orangery as a new events space by hosting their A Midsummer Night's Dream-themed party for a group of friends visiting from the UK. In the south of France, Tim and Sasha set out to turn their chateau's original bathing pool - which has sat empty for 15 years - into a unique feature for a new wellness garden. Plus, Fiona unveils a plaque and hosts a party to celebrate her chateau's 845th birthday. To ensure the drinks are served at the right temperature, she transforms one of the chateau's old dungeons into the perfect wine cellar

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Gavin Panella and Chantal Schaul are self-building a little bit of continental Europe in the heart of Norfolk. Chantal's from Luxembourg, where self-building is much more common. They've opted for a fixed-price kit, but also want to add plenty of personal touches, so the costs are racking up. What is more, they're building in a challenging plot, which calls for some imaginative design features. It's going to be one of the most colourful homes that Charlie Luxton has ever seen and he has lots of suggestions to help them realise their bright ideas

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit is to the Bridge Hotel in Scunthorpe and its new owners, Martin and Hannah Weaver. However, visitors Rob and Michelle from Seashells B&B find a condom by the entrance and Clare and Fran from The New Court Hotel are concerned about cleanliness. Tom and Samara from The Crown at Whitchurch think the rooms are little more than functional. Martin and Hannah try to impress their guests at breakfast by introducing them to their pet pig, but there are issues with eggs, but some harsh feedback disappoints the pair

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Seashells B&B in Sutton-on-Sea, where owners Michelle and Rob Earp hope their simple residence with an animal twist will win the day. Given Michelle and Rob criticised the Bridge Hotel, Martin and Hannah give their room a thorough going over and find all manner of issues. The self-service breakfast buffet receives some tough criticism in the morning, and Rob and Michelle are angry about their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to The Crown at Whitchurch in Herefordshire, where ex-army man Tom Jones runs the pub B&B with his step-daughter Samara Cohen

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the New Court Hotel in Usk, managed by Clare Davies, who faces complaints include peppery eggs and missing mushrooms at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet to find out what they have been paid and to settle some scores after being offended by some of the feedback they have received

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: Inspired by a 600-year old Welsh legend, George Clarke recruits Will Hardie and a team of skilled builders. Together they design a lakeside cabin built using the natural raw materials to be found in the surrounding lakes, hills and valleys near Machynlleth in Wales. They then have just two days to complete all preparations for this epic challenge before constructing the project in a day

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Stomp, a 13-year-old male okapi, is being encouraged to mate with younger female K'Tusha. But on his first attempt, he snaps his horn and causes K'Tusha a minor injury. Cameras at Chester Zoo also follow African painted dogs as they compete to be pack leader, and Raja the Bornean river turtle meets two prospective mates

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree meet Lincolnshire couple Tim and Rebecca, who have a birdbrained scheme to transform their aviary into a boutique brocante shop. DIY superwoman Fiona takes on the Kings Tower as she starts renovating her first luxury suite. It's no easy task as the room has been left in a 1970s time warp from when it was last used as part of a holiday camp. And wedding preparations hit boiling point for Tim and Sasha as a heatwave strikes the south of France

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The 10 remaining potters are challenged to make a bowl full of realistic ceramic fruits, and face a blindfolded throw down with a twist, as judges Rich Miller and Keith Brymer Jones decide who will be named potter of the week and who will be heading home. Siobhan McSweeney hosts

programme.title: Rebecka Martinsson: Arctic Murders
programme.desc: Part one of two. A young man's death after an overdose is the point of departure for an intensified effort against hard drugs in the community. This particular case bears links to both Anna Maria Mella's daughter and to Tommy's old friend. Thriller, starring Sascha Zacharias, Eva Melander and Thomas Oredsson. In Swedish

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A woman with a weak immune system owing to the radiotherapy she underwent for breast cancer is bitten by her cat, a minor injury that could cause her serious problems. A 71-year-old with terminal cancer is brought in with breathing difficulties and a decision must be made about whether to resuscitate her if her condition worsens. Meanwhile, a 12-year-old translates for his Brazilian grandmother and a five-year-old has her head wound stitched

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: New staff nurse Sophie attends to 22-year-old chef James, who accidentally stabbed himself in the leg while chopping tomatoes. During an eventful shift, she also uses chest compressions to keep alive another patient and helps 54-year-old Bernard, who was out cold for 10 minutes after falling and banging his head against a car. However, when his family arrives, it turns out he had been drinking

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to New Jersey's Spanish Pavilion, which is run by two warring brothers whose staff spend more time using their mobile phones than working. The chef plans to turn the eatery's fortunes around, and starts by giving the dining room and menu a modern makeover

programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, James May and Richard Hammond take on a challenge to find an alternative to the expensive diesel-fuelled hatchbacks driven by British police officers. Alan Carr and Justin Lee Collins take up the gauntlet as the Stars in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Eddie Eats Christmas
programme.desc: Eddie Hall takes on eating challenges featuring traditional Christmas foods from a variety of communities, beginning with a gargantuan Caribbean Christmas Combo

programme.title: Eddie Eats Christmas
programme.desc: Eddie Hall is in Yorkshire to get to grips with Latin American Christmas traditions, visiting an award-winning local Chilean restaurant and taking on a Brazilian barbecue bonanza

programme.title: Rick Stein: From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: The chef continues his gastronomic road trip from Venice to Istanbul taking in the countries of the former Byzantine Empire - a renowned melting pot of East and West. This instalment finds the gastronome in the city of Ravenna, where he discovers Piadinas, a thin Italian flatbread street food dating back to Roman times. He then crosses the Adriatic Sea to Croatia - a first for Rick - and a gets a chance to discover new a wealth of dishes such as pasticada, goat stew with peas and lamb peka

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson puts the Mercedes-Benz CLK Black Series through its paces, and Richard Hammond tests the limits of the Audi RS6 in a race against two French skiers. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition takes place in Essex and Suffolk, where the first host, 29-year-old entrepreneur Chris, plans to treat his guests - Samantha, Joanna, Mark and Claire - to a night of fine French cuisine, with the added bonus of ripped abs on display

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second night from Essex/Suffolk, and it is the turn of salon owner Sam to cook. She has opted for a good looking, simple menu, but foodie Chris is not impressed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Day four in Essex sees Polish party girl Joanna offer a taste of her homeland in a bid to win the prize. But some of the unusual flavour combinations throw her guests

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Newbury Park in southern California to help Mexican restaurant Mama Rita's. programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Musician Donagh is taking the giant step of relocating to the vibrant Spanish city of Valencia. With best friend Aime coming along to help him look for a new forever home, he calls on the house-hunting skills of Scarlette Douglas to find him the perfect city pad. Donagh has a maximum budget of £125,000 and a long wishlist, so the pressure is on Scarlette to deliver

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Nurse Karen and GP Alastair from Montrose long to relocate to the beautiful countryside of the Dordogne in France. Laura Hamilton shows them five options for their £175,000 budget

programme.title: Junior Bake Off

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Two divorcees go in search of a more successful match, and a woman who despairs of ever finding the right man finds her head turned from her date to another man in the restaurant. programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock and Paul Foot play take on Jon Richardson and Angela Barnes in the words-and-numbers game, while poet John Cooper Clarke joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr with Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets energy conservationist Andrew, who has decided to build a radical, self-heating home for his family - the first of its kind in the UK. He aims to heat the house all year round by storing the warmth of the summer sun into insulated earth banks over and around the house, and then drawing the warmth back into the living spaces in winter. However, this pioneering construction seems an exercise in trial and error from the start, and what began as a seemingly simple, pure concept becomes a complicated feat of engineering

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 63-year-old builder falls from a great height while working on a construction site, and his daughter shares her stories of the sacrifices he made for her. Doctors fear a teenager who has been hit by a car may have sustained brain injuries, while a man who collapsed while playing golf talks about his unconventional upbringing in Kenya and how he had to adapt to fulfill his dreams

programme.title: Secret Safari: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Documentary exploring Kenya's 900,000 wildlife conservancy Ol Pejeta, providing a safe home to a vast range of species including elephants, rhinos, hippos and lions to hyenas, ostriches and cocktail ants. A hungry pride of lions needs to make a kill, but their best hunter has gone missing. An endangered rhino gives birth, but the rangers fear the calf will be vulnerable to predators

programme.title: Jamie and Jimmy's Friday Night Feast
programme.desc: In an episode filmed in 2019, Jamie Oliver and Jimmy Doherty are joined by guest Joe Lycett. Jamie teaches Joe to make a traditional wild boar and pappardelle ragu from the restaurant he spent time in while holidaying in Italy, and the comedian wears an authentic Italian housecoat to complete the look. Jamie also celebrates the weekend with a scrumptious veggie tikka masala, with beautiful marinated and grilled veggies served with paneer cheese and amazing little pancakes to mop up the classic sauce. Jimmy has a smoking hot tip for oven-cooked barbecue ribs that looks impressive, but is actually super simple to do

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets Chris and Jodie, who are turning a broken-down camper into a cross between a mini HGV and a caravan. A couple reinvent a broken railway carriage as a rustic retreat, and for their observatory, George and Will Hardie learn how to take photos with a beer can

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

They're dreaming of a permanent move to their favourite part of the Costa Blanca with their six cats and rescue dog and would love to find a house with plenty of outside space for their furry family. Jasmine manages to find five properties within their maximum budget of £185,000, but whether any of them will be liked by her clients remains to be seen

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

However, some of his guests - Barb Wiles, Donna Harris, Duncan Fielding and Caroline Nash - are left confused by his Vichyssoise soup starter, and the tiramisu causes one of them to choke

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mother-of-three Donna Harris hosts the second dinner party in Northampton, and hopes that three courses of pure comfort-food will be enough to secure the £1,000 prize. Donna spends almost as much time fixing her make-up as she does preparing the meal, and when guests Duncan Fielding and Caroline Nash discover a secret stash of football shirts, they realise there is more to their hostess than meets the eye

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Part-time actress Caroline Nash is the host on day three of the competition in Northampton, and she hopes that a menu based on her travels will dazzle her guests. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Attention-loving businessman and keen cricketer Duncan Fielding takes centre stage in hosting the final dinner party from Northampton. He creates a menu based on the story of his life - which is full of surprises and full of spice - but it proves a challenge for three of his guests, who like their food mild. His main feature is a chicken and reindeer curry, and the table is impressed to discover that he runs a community pub from the bottom of his garden

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug's bowling team has to win its next match - or it will lose its sponsor. Carrie is the worst player, and captain Doug soon comes under pressure to drop his wife from the team. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.desc: Doug becomes jittery after Carrie persuades him to invest his Christmas bonus in an internet company, while Arthur vows to spruce up his festive decorations. Comedy, starring Kevin James, Leah Remini and Jerry Stiller

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Mojito, a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn, New York. The restaurant was the shared dream of two newlyweds who have separated since its opening, and whose constant public quarrelling is distracting staff and driving customers away

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Jamie and Jimmy's Friday Night Feast
programme.desc: In this episode, filmed in 2019, Hollywood legend Susan Sarandon swaps the glamour of Hollywood for Southend Pier, as Jamie and Jimmy make Sicilian-inspired chicken thighs wrapped in smoky pancetta, inspired by the actress' Italian roots. programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets energy conservationist Andrew, who has decided to build a radical, self-heating home for his family - the first of its kind in the UK. He aims to heat the house all year round by storing the warmth of the summer sun into insulated earth banks over and around the house, and then drawing the warmth back into the living spaces in winter. However, this pioneering construction seems an exercise in trial and error from the start, and what began as a seemingly simple, pure concept becomes a complicated feat of engineering

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: In Shropshire, a man moves in to his parents' home to help put a stop to a neighbour's harassment, but events escalate into violence. In Essex, a mother and her daughter find what seems to be the perfect house, only for their lives to be made a misery after they object to a planning application for an extension. Two elderly residents who feel they are the victims of noise from next door have to deny any wrongdoing themselves when the police arrive on their doorstep

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when lawyers Fred and Lizzy Bellamy are found murdered in their sleep. The case leads them to two couples who are in the process of adopting children from Haiti, but the detectives uncover signs of abuse that point to a human-trafficking ring

programme.desc: A woman is attacked and killed just hours after a serial rapist is freed on parole, prompting McCoy to pull out all the stops to bring him to justice - but before long the detective realises the wanted man could be innocent. Drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the brutal murder of a TV reporter who had been alleging that a billionaire Wall Street investment adviser was a fraud. Evidence of love triangles and hedge fund fraud soon comes to the fore. Crime drama, starring Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson

programme.desc: The team's old enemy Ari Haswari returns, working on behalf of a secretive terrorist faction. Gibbs is distressed to learn he is the next target, but does not realise the killer has another more complex scheme in mind. Guest starring Rudolf Martin, with Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. The team reels in the wake of the terrorist attack, but tries to avenge Kate's death by collecting as much information as possible on Ari before he does any more damage. Meanwhile, Gibbs learns one of his old flames has been named as the new NCIS director

programme.desc: An assistant district attorney is found strangled in his car in an area notorious for prostitution. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The rape and murder of a criminology student puts detectives Stabler and Benson on the trail of a killer with an expert knowledge of forensics. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Sheriff Metzger asks Jessica to help clear his no-good younger brother, who finds himself in a compromising position and stands accused of murdering his boss. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: A famously reclusive author turns up dead and Castle is determined to solve his hero's murder, but he and Beckett discover that truth is stranger than fiction as they dig deeper

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The shooting of a sleazy retired policeman in a neighbourhood notorious for prostitution leads Briscoe and Curtis to two suburban housewives who are secretly moonlighting. However, it soon becomes apparent that whoever killed the victim could have been acting in self-defence. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when a plaintiff involved in a high-profile lawsuit against airline Pan World is found dead in his car. The detectives soon discover the case had been delayed after the presiding judge was murdered and the clues lead to a lawyer willing to do anything for money

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when Harold and Joyce Foley arrive home to find their son and housekeeper murdered. The detectives start to believe the couple's work on a controversial pharmaceutical study made them targets, until further evidence changes their minds

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A carjacking turns nasty when an off-duty police officer is killed and the driver is kidnapped. Luckily, Briscoe and Curtis capture one of the perpetrators, who offers to reveal the whereabouts of the missing driver to DA Ross - in exchange for immunity on the cop-killing charge. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the murders of a firefighter and his wife. The case leads to one of the dead man's colleagues, whom the detectives suspect resorted to extreme measures to cover up the crime - but prosecutors at the district attorney's office discover that taking the suspect to court could have serious political repercussions

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the murders of two scientists found stabbed to death following a fire. The evidence points to a mentally disturbed woman, but Cutter and Rubirosa suspect she may have been manipulated by someone else

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. The team reels in the wake of the terrorist attack, but tries to avenge Kate's death by collecting as much information as possible on Ari before he does any more damage. Meanwhile, Gibbs learns one of his old flames has been named as the new NCIS director

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gibbs continues to blame himself for Kate's death, and enlists Jenny's help to track down Ari - but they are nearly killed in a shoot-out. Just when all seems lost, however, Ziva is able to point the investigation in the right direction. Starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs tries to extract information from a convict on death row about where he hid the bodies of his victims. However, the killer proves reluctant to confess, forcing the team to solve the case by unconventional means. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents set out to find the stolen body of a Civil War general, but Dr Elaine Burns is shocked to discover the entombed corpse of a Marine sergeant instead, eventually reaching the conclusion he was buried alive. Meanwhile, Mossad agent Ziva David returns as a replacement for Kate, much to Gibbs's displeasure. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson reluctantly looks to her own for a suspect when defence attorney Nikki Staines is raped after a police charity event

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man goes on a killing spree, leaving Benson and the team to detain a prostitute who is part of his social circle. As the detectives work with her to track down their quarry, they find themselves drawn into her world and must fight to save her life. Hard-hitting drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU's holiday celebrations are disrupted when Detective Tutuola's ex-brother-in-law is arrested for a brutal attack of a priest just before Christmas. He protests his innocence despite a significant criminal record, and appeals to the force to find evidence that exonerates him. In the process, a buried church scandal begins to unravel. Starring Ice-T, Olivia Benson and Nick Amaro

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the murder of an elderly woman who they learn was dying of cancer but had been determined to live out her final days to the full - a philosophy that encompassed dating a variety of men. Discovering her most recent gentleman callers all have alibis, they turn their attention to the murder weapon and realise they are looking for a serial killer. Anthony Rapp and Jane Krakowski guest star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Novak enlists Clark's help to gather evidence against a judge whose unacceptable bias in two child-abuse cases resulted in the death of a youngster and the wrongful imprisonment of an innocent woman. Police drama, starring Diane Neal, Marlo Thomas, Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A school headmistress is caught on camera sexually assaulting a teenage boy, but her behaviour later proves to have been caused by an operable brain tumour, prompting Novak and the team to allow a plea bargain. Unfortunately, the case turns out to have unforeseen complications. Starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Diane Neal

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A young girl hires Jason to help her 'divorce' her parents ahead of Christmas, but mild amusement gives way to serious misgivings when a judge appoints him as her legal guardian

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Beckett and team are called to a car park, where they examine the dead body of a courier who had been driving a bulletproof car with a secret compartment built into the floor. The victim was delivering a very important load - a Van Gogh painting bought at auction for $64million - which is now missing. Castle and Beckett work with the key witness to track down the painting and catch the killer

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: First of a three-part story. The team investigates when the headless corpse of a film studio executive is found floating in a river, and her personal trainer and ex-husband soon prove likely suspects. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when a trucking company owner is found murdered. They suspect his business partner Stan Klein is the culprit when they discover his links to the Russian mob and a scheme to defraud the victim, but as the case comes to court it seems Klein's son may have had reason to kill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the death of a troubled NYPD officer, a man with mounting financial difficulties who was killed by colleagues after taking hostages at gunpoint. As the pair dig deeper into his life, they discover a stash of valuable documents in his apartment as well as a body, and the evidence leads to a man claiming to be the illegitimate son of a famous president

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives probe the shooting of a motorist, and arrest a man who helped the victim change a tyre on his car shortly before he was killed. The suspect protests his innocence, and points the investigators in the direction of another man who admits to the crime and even signs a confession, but further inquiries cast doubt on his guilt. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The chief suspect in the murder of several homeless men appears to be a schizophrenic street performer. Detectives Lupo and Bernard's problems compound when they find evidence suggesting a possible copycat is at work. Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the death of war veteran Greg Tanner, whose body was discovered in a Hudson University car park. Clues lead the duo to law professor Kevin Franklin, a former employee of the Department of Justice, and the picture gets clearer as Franklin's memos from the Bush Administration are leaked as the case goes to court. The first episode in the final season of the crime drama, starring Jeremy Sisto, Anthony Anderson and Sam Waterston

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs tries to extract information from a convict on death row about where he hid the bodies of his victims. However, the killer proves reluctant to confess, forcing the team to solve the case by unconventional means. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents set out to find the stolen body of a Civil War general, but Dr Elaine Burns is shocked to discover the entombed corpse of a Marine sergeant instead, eventually reaching the conclusion he was buried alive. Meanwhile, Mossad agent Ziva David returns as a replacement for Kate, much to Gibbs's displeasure. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine who appears to have been leading a double life is shot dead. As the investigation continues, however, the team uncovers a case of identity theft - together with a tangled motive involving a mysterious package and a wronged wife. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a marine's wife is shown live on the internet and inquiries point to two housewives who were running their own pornographic website, but have since vanished. The search for the missing pair begins with the webster administrator - and ends with a surprising discovery

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Two ambitious district attorneys clash over a murder case, and Benson is sure the prosecuting county has wrongly accused a rape victim of killing her ex-boyfriend. New evidence and a different suspect are put forward, but the Suffolk County DA will not drop her case. Hard-hitting drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team is tasked to track down a man who is picking up and then attacking closet gay married men. After a suspect is apprehended, his attorney manages to muddy the waters regarding the legitimacy of the arrest. Mariska Hargitay and Raul Esparza star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A janitor violently attacks a school coach, but the SVU team uncovers mitigating circumstances, connecting his behaviour to a history of sexual abuse. They identify more victims of the same predator, including a prisoner Reggie Rhodes (Mike Tyson) on death row. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Part two of three. The investigation into the warring prostitution rings threatens to tear the SVU team apart, but the squad is determined to uncover the truth. Cragen also stands accused of murder. Return of the crime drama, starring Dann Florek and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Part three of three. Cragen wakes up alongside a dead escort, who had been a potential witness. The squad tries to bring the case to a close as the detectives reach breaking point. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.desc: Jason represents a teenager arrested for robbing a jewellery store with an older man, arguing that she was a victim of his abuse and not his willing accomplice

Western drama, starring Melanie Scrofano

programme.title: Spitfire Women
programme.desc: The story of the 168 female pilots who served in Britain's Air Transport Auxiliary - an organisation responsible for delivering aircraft to the RAF on the front lines of battle during the Second World War. Despite having no radio or navigation equipment, ATA pilots were expected to fly any kind of aircraft to the destinations where they were most needed, often risking their lives in the process. The film also features interviews with the last surviving female veterans, who speak about the dangers they encountered in the skies and the discrimination they faced back home

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Rick Edwards hosts a game show in which 30 recurring players compete for a daily prize of up to £1,500 and the chance to win £10,000. Every right answer takes them a step closer to a shot at that jackpot - but a single 'impossible' answer knocks them out for the day

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: The game show returns in a midweek slot, with a host of fresh games designed to test contestants' skill, nerve and determination. First up is Derry-Londonderry radiographer Lindsey, who believes that working in the trauma department of Southampton Hospital will help her stay calm under pressure. She is followed by retired Yorkshireman Keith, who at 70 is the oldest person to have appeared on the show. Will his extra years give him an advantage in defeating the Cube? Phillip Schofield hosts

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present a 1990s edition of the celebrity quiz, featuring teams of famous faces from the decade seeking unlikely answers. The contestants are Jayne Middlemiss, Diane Louise Jordan, Sarah Cawood, Jeremy Spake, Angus Loughran, Kriss Akabusi MBE, Philip Franks and Sue Jenkins

programme.title: The Cube

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present a star-studded sports special, as famous faces take part in the general knowledge quiz in which they try to come up with the least likely correct answers to a series of questions posed to members of the public. programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Phillip Schofield invites two more competitors to put their skills to the test in the high-pressure contest. Adam Bedford hopes that winning will give him a chance to offer his wife a honeymoon to remember, while rival Nathalie Hannath has a much more practical motive for seeking the jackpot - she plans to buy double-glazing for her entire family. However, both must prove their abilities in a series of increasingly difficult challenges, ranging from agility tests to skill trials, before they can claim the top prize of £250,000

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present as famous faces take part in the general knowledge quiz in which they try to come up with the least likely correct answers to a series of questions posed to members of the public. Taking part are Gail Emms, Matthew Hoggard, Bonnie Langford, Frazer Hines, Dalton Grant, Charlie Stayt, Helen Lederer and Shaun Williamson

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds.
